project: File Browser Navigation, Editor Read-Only Mode & Directory Picker Fixes
overview: Improve the web-terminal's file browser with back-button navigation and folder drill-down, add a read-only default mode to the code editor with an edit toggle, and fix several UX bugs in the session wizard's directory selection UI.
goals: File tree header gains a back button to navigate to the parent directory
Double-clicking a folder changes the file tree root into that folder
Switching sessions and back restores the previously browsed file tree root
Editor opens files in read-only mode by default; toolbar Edit button toggles to read-write with auto-save
Wizard directory picker: selecting a subdirectory immediately updates the 'selected' button state
Wizard directory picker: fix checkbox double-toggle caused by htmlFor
Wizard directory picker: back button restyled as a prominent arrow button
nonGoals: No browsing history stack or forward/back multi-step navigation — only parent traversal
No breadcrumb navigation — path shown as full absolute path
No configurable auto-save toggle — editing mode always uses existing auto-save
No drag-and-drop reordering in file tree
successMetrics: Back button in file tree header navigates to parent directory in under 1 click
Double-click folder updates file tree root and path display correctly
Session switch round-trip preserves file tree root path
Opened file is non-editable until Edit button is clicked
Wizard checkbox toggles exactly once per click
All E2E tests pass via Playwright

routes.name: Main App
routes.purpose: Terminal, file tree, editor — single page app

routes.name: List Directory
routes.purpose: Returns directory contents for file tree

routes.name: Browse Directories
routes.purpose: Returns subdirectories for wizard directory picker

uiNotes: File tree header: add a '← Back' button (arrow icon) left of the path display; disabled when at session cwd root
File tree path display: show full absolute path of current file tree root
Double-click on folder row in file tree changes fileTreeRoot and re-renders
Editor toolbar: add 'Edit' button (pencil icon or text) that toggles CodeMirror readOnly state
Editor toolbar: in read-only mode show lock icon / 'Read-Only' label; in edit mode show pencil icon / 'Editing'
Wizard back button: larger, with '←' arrow icon, visually prominent (not a plain text link)
rules: fileTreeRoot per session is stored in a JS Map keyed by session ID
When switching to Files tab, restore the stored fileTreeRoot for the active session (default: session cwd)
Editor readOnly is the default; toggling to edit enables the existing auto-save (1s debounce)
Wizard checkbox inputs must not have htmlFor on the label that wraps them (prevents double toggle)
Back button in file tree is hidden or disabled when fileTreeRoot equals the session cwd

stories.title: Fix wizard directory picker checkbox double-toggle
stories.description: As a user, I want the directory checkbox in the wizard to toggle exactly once per click so that my selection is not immediately reversed.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove htmlFor attribute from label elements that wrap checkbox inputs in the wizard directory picker (app.js renderDirStep area)
Example: clicking a directory checkbox selects it and the checked state remains visible
Negative case: clicking the label text next to the checkbox does not cause a double-toggle (uncheck then recheck)
Existing directory selection behavior is unchanged (single-click selects, double-click navigates)

stories.title: Fix wizard selected-directory button state sync
stories.description: As a user, I want the 'selected' / 'Next' button in the wizard to immediately reflect the currently selected subdirectory so I know my choice registered.
acceptanceCriteria: When a subdirectory is single-clicked, the footer 'Next' button text updates to show the selected directory name or path
The Next button becomes enabled immediately upon selection (no extra click needed)
Example: click 'src' folder → Next button shows 'Next (src)' or similar and is enabled
Negative case: if no directory is selected, Next button remains disabled or shows default session cwd
Previously selected directory is deselected visually when a new one is clicked

stories.title: Restyle wizard back button as prominent arrow button
stories.description: As a user, I want the wizard's back/parent-directory button to be visually prominent with an arrow icon so it is easy to find and tap.
acceptanceCriteria: Back button in wizard directory browser displays '←' arrow icon (or ← Back text)
Button has larger padding, min-height ~40px, clear hover/active states
Button is visually distinct from directory list items
Example: navigating into /home/user/project, the back button is clearly visible at the top
Negative case: at the filesystem root '/', back button is disabled or hidden

stories.title: File tree back button and parent navigation
stories.description: As a user, I want a back button in the file tree header to navigate to the parent directory so I can move up the directory tree.
acceptanceCriteria: A '←' back button is added to the file tree header, positioned left of the current path display
Clicking the back button sets fileTreeRoot to the parent directory and re-renders the file tree
The path display (#file-tree-path) updates to show the new full absolute path
Example: current root is /home/user/project/src → click back → root becomes /home/user/project
Negative case: when fileTreeRoot equals the session's cwd, back button is disabled (grayed out) to prevent navigating above the session root
Back button uses '←' arrow icon, visually consistent with other header buttons

stories.title: Double-click folder to change file tree root
stories.description: As a user, I want to double-click a folder in the file tree to drill into it as the new root so I can focus on a subdirectory.
acceptanceCriteria: Double-clicking a folder in the file tree sets fileTreeRoot to that folder's absolute path
The file tree re-renders showing only the contents of the new root
The path display updates to the new absolute path
Single-click on folder still expands/collapses inline (existing behavior preserved)
Example: double-click 'src' folder at /home/user/project/src → file tree root changes, shows src contents at top level
Negative case: double-clicking a file does not change the root (files open in editor as before)

stories.title: Per-session file tree root persistence
stories.description: As a user, I want each session to remember its file tree root directory so that switching sessions and switching back restores my browsing position.
acceptanceCriteria: A JavaScript Map (sessionFileTreeRoots) stores fileTreeRoot keyed by session ID
When switching away from a session, the current fileTreeRoot is saved to the map
When switching to a session, the stored fileTreeRoot is restored (or defaults to session cwd if none stored)
When the Files sidebar tab is activated, it uses the stored root for the current session
Example: session A browsed to /home/user/project/src, switch to session B, switch back to A → file tree shows /home/user/project/src
Negative case: deleting a session removes its entry from the map; a new session starts at its cwd

stories.title: Editor read-only mode by default
stories.description: As a user, I want files to open in read-only mode by default so I don't accidentally modify them.
acceptanceCriteria: openFileInEditor() creates the CodeMirror EditorView with readOnly: true in the EditorState config
In read-only mode, typing does not modify the document
In read-only mode, the save status area shows a lock icon or 'Read-Only' text instead of save status
Standard text selection and Ctrl+C / Cmd+C copy still work in read-only mode
Example: open a .js file → cannot type or paste into it, but can select and copy text
Negative case: keyboard shortcuts like Ctrl+S do nothing in read-only mode (no save attempt)

stories.title: Editor toolbar Edit button to toggle read-write
stories.description: As a user, I want an Edit button in the editor toolbar to switch from read-only to editing mode so I can modify the file when I choose.
acceptanceCriteria: An 'Edit' button (pencil icon or '✏ Edit' text) is added to the editor toolbar
Clicking Edit toggles CodeMirror's readOnly state from true to false via EditorView.dispatch with readOnly reconfiguration
After toggling to edit mode: button changes to show 'Editing' state, auto-save (1s debounce) is active, save status shows normally
Clicking again toggles back to read-only (if no unsaved changes, or prompts to save first)
Example: open file (read-only) → click Edit → type changes → auto-save triggers after 1s → status shows '✓ Saved'
Negative case: toggling back to read-only with unsaved changes prompts user to save or discard

stories.title: Add Playwright E2E test infrastructure
stories.description: As a developer, I want Playwright E2E test scaffolding so that new features can be verified with automated browser tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Install @playwright/test as devDependency: npm install -D @playwright/test
Create playwright.config.js with baseURL pointing to localhost server port
Add 'test:e2e' script to package.json: 'npx playwright test'
Add a smoke test (tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js) that loads the app and verifies the main page renders
Example: npx playwright test runs and the smoke test passes
Negative case: test fails gracefully with clear error if server is not running

stories.title: E2E tests for file browser navigation
stories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests covering the file browser back button, double-click navigation, and session persistence so regressions are caught.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: back button navigates to parent directory and path display updates
Test: double-click folder changes file tree root
Test: switch session and back, file tree root is restored
Test: back button is disabled at session cwd root
All tests pass via npx playwright test

stories.title: E2E tests for editor read-only mode and edit toggle
stories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests covering the editor's read-only default and edit toggle so regressions are caught.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: opening a file shows read-only state (typing has no effect)
Test: clicking Edit button enables editing
Test: auto-save triggers after editing
Test: toggling back to read-only works
All tests pass via npx playwright test

stories.title: E2E tests for wizard directory picker fixes
stories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests covering the wizard directory picker fixes so regressions are caught.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: checkbox toggles exactly once per click (no double-toggle)
Test: selecting a subdirectory updates the Next button state
Test: back button in wizard is visually prominent and functional
All tests pass via npx playwright test
